rules.name: Suspicious User Execution of Malicious Payload
rules.author: Elastic
rules.content:
FROM logs-endpoint.events.process-*
| WHERE event.type == "start" and process.parent.name in ("outlook.exe", "winword.exe")
| WHERE process.name in ("powershell.exe", "cmd.exe", "wscript.exe")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY host.name, process.name

rules.name: Potential Command and Control Beaconing
rules.author: Elastic
rules.content:
FROM logs-network.traffic-*
| WHERE destination.port in (443, 8443) and network.direction == "outbound"
| STATS beacons = COUNT(*) BY source.ip, destination.ip
| WHERE beacons > 100
